name: State Street Corporation Depositary shares each representing a 1/4000th ownership interest in a share of Fixed-to-Floating Rate Non-Cumulative
summary: State Street Corporation Depositary shares represent ownership in a fraction of a share of preferred stock issued by State Street Corporation, a financial services and bank holding company. These shares offer investors a way to invest in State Street's preferred stock, which typically pays fixed-to-floating rate non-cumulative dividends. State Street provides a range of financial services to institutional investors globally.
